description.ko: 복잡한 음향 패턴을 생동감 넘치는 3D 건축적 빛의 구조로 변환하는 몰입형 디지털 아트 경험입니다.
description.en: An immersive digital art experience that translates complex acoustic patterns into vibrant, 3D architectural light structures.

prompt: Cinematic 8k render of ECHO-0 sound visualization, abstract fluid waves of light reacting to bass frequencies, neon cyan and deep violet particles, parametric architecture made of sound waves, dark studio background, hyper-realistic, volumetric lighting.
